name: innerwarden
desc: Local safety layer for AI agents that use the terminal. Screens risky commands and MCP/tool calls, watches Linux activity with eBPF, blocks dangerous behavior,…
descFull: Local safety layer for AI agents that use the terminal. Screens risky commands and MCP/tool calls, watches Linux activity with eBPF, blocks dangerous behavior, and keeps audit trails local. Open source, self-hosted, dry-run by default.
